title: Product Photography Studio Shot
promptText: Professional product photography of [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] on a [SURFACE_MATERIAL] surface. [LIGHTING_SETUP] lighting with soft shadows. The product is positioned at a [ANGLE] angle showing its best features. Background is [BACKGROUND_STYLE]. Styled with [PROPS] as complementary props. Shot with a macro lens for crisp detail, shallow depth of field on the background. Commercial advertising quality, color-accurate, 8K resolution. The overall mood is [MOOD].
description: Creating professional product photos typically requires expensive equipment and studio time. This prompt generates commercial-grade product photography that rivals professional studio shots. By specifying surface materials, lighting setups, and complementary props, you get images that tell a visual story about your product's positioning and brand identity. The macro lens specification ensures the AI renders fine product details sharply. Use these images for e-commerce listings, social media ads, pitch decks, or mockups before investing in a real photo shoot.

variables.name: PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION
variables.example: a matte black wireless earbuds case with rose gold accents

variables.name: BACKGROUND_STYLE
variables.example: gradient from charcoal to deep navy

variables.name: PROPS
variables.example: a single eucalyptus sprig and water droplets

tips: Match props to your brand's visual identity for consistency
Specify exact brand colors if your product has specific colorways
Request multiple angles in separate prompts to build a complete product gallery
exampleOutput: A studio product photograph of matte black wireless earbuds case with rose gold accents, sitting on polished dark marble. Three-point soft box lighting creates gentle highlights on the metallic accents. Shot from a 45-degree overhead angle. Charcoal-to-navy gradient background. A single eucalyptus sprig adds organic contrast. Premium minimalist aesthetic.
metaDescription: Generate professional product photography without a studio. Try this DALL-E prompt for commercial-quality e-commerce and advertising images.
